valid: For the period 18:00 (UTC) on Sun 26 Apr 2026 to 18:00 (UTC) on Mon 27 Apr 2026
general_synopsis: High Sole 1024 expected Shannon 1030 by midday Monday. High German Bight 1028 dissipating
